title: adhatoda latibracteata
intro: Adhatoda latibracteata, also known as Vasaka or Malabar nut tree, is a tropical plant native to the Western Ghats of India. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Adhatoda latibracteata include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. Adhatoda latibracteata can be prepared as herbal tea, decoction, or extract, and is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
